guidance.high_sensitivity_advisor: Do not auto-confirm without advisor/source evidence. Highest product trust risk.
guidance.cofounder_same_org_but_role_missing: Likely important; confirm only with explicit founder/cofounder evidence.
guidance.cofounder_no_structured_evidence: Do not keep as cofounder without external evidence; strong deletion candidate if source remains unsupported.
guidance.collaborator_publication_claim: Verify against publication/project source before confirming.
guidance.colleague_same_org_dates_missing: Usually lower product value; confirm only if overlap dates or source-backed team evidence exists.
guidance.colleague_no_shared_org: Weakest relation bucket; deletion candidates after sample review.
